translations.en: a strong looking man with just one arm.
translations.zh: 看起來強壯但只有一隻手臂的男子。

translations.en: "Hello," he shouts, waving.
translations.zh: 「你好！」他揮手高呼。

translations.en: "You've met @Zeke before, 'aven't ya?" he says, glaring at you.
translations.zh: 「你以前見過@Zeke（齊克），是嗎？」他瞪著你說。

translations.en: "What d'ya need?"
translations.zh: 「你需要什麼？」

translations.en: "@Zeke the one-armed @beekeep, it is."
translations.zh: 「@Zeke（獨臂）@beekeep（養蜂）人齊克，正是在下。」

translations.en: "Lost me arm and gained that name in @battle." He flashes a yellowed grin at you.
translations.zh: 「在@battle（戰場）上丟了手臂，得了這個稱號。」他向你露出泛黃的牙齒笑著。

translations.en: "'Twas a horrid affair, but @Mondain had to be thwarted."
translations.zh: 「那是場可怕的事，但@Mondain（蒙丹）必須被阻止。」

translations.en: "You must be new here." He looks to the ground.
translations.zh: 「你一定是剛來的。」他低頭看地。

translations.en: "He brought an age of great evil unto our land."
translations.zh: 「他為我們的土地帶來了巨大邪惡的時代。」

translations.en: "Yet try and tell today's children of the age of darkness..."
translations.zh: 「然而試著向今日的孩子們講述那個黑暗時代……」

translations.en: "They believe nothing can go wrong, as long as the Avatar lives."
translations.zh: 「他們相信只要聖者在世，就不會有任何差錯。」

translations.en: "Bees are true friends. They work all day, making honey and scattering pollen."
translations.zh: 「蜜蜂是真正的朋友。它們整日辛勤工作，釀造蜂蜜、傳播花粉。」

translations.en: "All we have to do is provide them with @hives."
translations.zh: 「我們只需要提供@hives（蜂巢）給它們。」

translations.en: He laughs. "And get stung once in a while!"
translations.zh: 他大笑。「偶爾被螫一下！」

translations.en: "I buys all my hives from a nice lady in Minoc named Michelle."
translations.zh: 「我的蜂巢都從敏諾克一位叫米歇爾的好女士那裡買的。」

translations.en: "She weaves them out of straw."
translations.zh: 「她用稻草編製它們。」

translations.en: "I'm the @beekeeper here at the abbey."
translations.zh: 「我是修道院這裡的@beekeeper（養蜂）人。」

translations.en: "If you want to @buy @honey, or @sell me a honey jar I'm all ears (if only one-armed)."
translations.zh: 「若你想@buy（買）@honey（蜂蜜），或@sell（賣）一個蜂蜜罐，我洗耳恭聽（雖然只有一隻手臂）。」

translations.en: "Have a nice $T."
translations.zh: 「$T愉快。」

translations.en: He scratches his head and looks around.
translations.zh: 他搔搔頭，環顧四周。

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「你們哪位？」

translations.en: "It'll cost you 10 gold for the 'oney, interested?"
translations.zh: 「蜂蜜要10枚金幣，有意嗎？」

translations.en: "You look pretty full to me."
translations.zh: 「你帶的東西已經很多了。」

translations.en: "Excellent!" After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the honey.
translations.zh: 「太好了！」接過$Y的金幣後，$N遞上蜂蜜。

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "You ain't that good-looking. My price is 10 gold."
translations.zh: $N望向$Y。「你沒那麼好看。我的價格是10枚金幣。」

translations.en: "Enjoy your 'oney."
translations.zh: 「好好享用你的蜂蜜。」

translations.en: "You'll find none better."
translations.zh: 「你找不到更好的了。」

translations.en: "Sorry, none of you has anything I need."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，你們沒有一個有我需要的東西。」

translations.en: $N turns to $Y, and says "Will you take 7 gold for that honey jar?"
translations.zh: $N轉向$Y，說道：「那個蜂蜜罐，7枚金幣如何？」

translations.en: "Done!" He hands $Y 7 gold pieces and takes the honey jar.
translations.zh: 「成交！」他遞給$Y 7枚金幣，取走蜂蜜罐。

translations.en: "Sorry, you 'aven't any 'oney jars."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，你沒有蜂蜜罐。」

translations.en: "Changed your mind, eh?" he folds his arms.
translations.zh: 「改變主意了，嗯？」他抱起手臂。

translator_notes: 齊克是獨臂養蜂人，曾在對抗蒙丹的戰鬥中失去手臂。口語化，'aven't/'oney等省音字略去h音。可購買蜂蜜或出售蜂蜜罐。
